title: Schneider Electric EcoStruxure PME and EPO

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Schneider Electric EcoStruxure PME and EPO
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/21
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*overview.jsp*'
            - '*product-help.schneider-electric.com*'
            - '*www.se.com*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
